pairs.rationale: ILO construct dimension (conceptual) bridges to domain dimension (strategic) only when convergence requirements for DU_MODEL_EVALUATION are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (conceptual) bridges to domain dimension (procedural) only when convergence requirements for DU_TREE_STRUCTURE_REASONING are satisfied.

ILO construct dimension (conceptual) bridges to domain dimension (strategic) only when convergence requirements for DU_MODEL_EVALUATION are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (reflective) bridges to domain dimension (strategic) only when convergence requirements for DU_MODEL_EVALUATION are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (conceptual) bridges to domain dimension (strategic) only when convergence requirements for DU_MODEL_EVALUATION are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (procedural) bridges to domain dimension (strategic) only when convergence requirements for DU_THRESHOLD_REASONING are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (conceptual) bridges to domain dimension (reflective) only when convergence requirements for DU_REFLECTIVE_UNDERSTANDING are satisfied.
ILO construct dimension (strategic) bridges to domain dimension (procedural) only when convergence requirements for DU_TREE_STRUCTURE_REASONING are satisfied.
